jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Command service/worker regressions 20/20 and neighboring deployment/operation-task/commands API tests 20/20 passed during command worker ownership remediation
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active; /api/status healthy; command/deployment/task route probes returned 401/307/200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 command/deployment background-worker persistent ownership metadata slice
lastRun.summary: RUNNING command requests now persist worker ownership metadata (workerId and workerHeartbeatAt), refresh it during background SSH execution, clear it on terminal/cancel/failure states, and use worker heartbeat freshness for stale-running recovery with an updatedAt fallback for legacy rows.
validation: git status and overlap process check before work
targeted P6 durable command/deployment background-worker ownership metadata slice
npx vitest run src/lib/command/__tests__/service.test.ts src/lib/command/worker.test.ts passed 20/20
npx prisma db push applied schema changes
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Applied Prisma schema via db push, restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service; readiness and smoke checks passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Fresh comprehensive audit is due after this sixth successful remediation run; then continue P6 richer command/deployment task status reconciliation and operator-visible worker diagnostics.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
